zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Paveley於大約1340年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾維斯特波利時，她的父親John de Paveley27歲，母親Agnes de la Mare24歲。她於大約1354年與Sir John de St Lo在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年10月21日之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特牛頓 聖 勒，埋葬在英國薩默塞特巴斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Paveley于大约1340年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾維斯特波利时，她的父亲John de Paveley27岁，母亲Agnes de la Mare24岁。她于大约1354年与Sir John de St Lo在英国維爾爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年10月21日之后在英国英格兰薩默塞特牛頓 聖 勒，埋葬在英国薩默塞特巴斯。

variants.name: Pavelin

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Paveley was born about 1340, in Westbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Paveley, was 27 and her mother, Agnes de la Mare, was 24. She married Sir John de St Lo about 1354, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died after 21 October 1361, in Newton St Loe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Bath, Somerset, England.

fr.Newton St Loe, Somerset, England: Newton St Loe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Paveley est née environ 1340, à Westbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Paveley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes de la Mare, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de St Lo environ 1354, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 21 octobre 1361, à Newton St Loe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.Newton St Loe, Somerset, England: Newton St Loe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Paveley um 1340 in Westbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Paveley 27 und ihre Mutter Agnes de la Mare 24. Sie hat um 1354 in Wiltshire, England Sir John de St Lo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 21. Oktober 1361 in Newton St Loe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bath, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Paveley è nata il circa 1340 nel Westbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Paveley, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Agnes de la Mare, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de St Lo circa 1354, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 21 ottobre 1361, nel Newton St Loe, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Bath, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Paveleyが約1340年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアウエストブリーで生まれた時，父John de Paveleyは27歳，母Agnes de la Mareは24歳であった。約1354年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでSir John de St Loと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年10月21日以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトニュートン スト ロで死去し，イギリスソメルセトバスにて埋葬された。

ko.Newton St Loe, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 뉴턴 스트 로이
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Paveley(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 웨스트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Paveley(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de la Mare(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1354년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Sir John de St Lo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 10월 21일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 뉴턴 스트 로이에서 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 바스에 묻혔다.

pt.Newton St Loe, Somerset, England: Newton St Loe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Paveley nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Westbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Paveley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de la Mare, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de St Lo aproximadamente 1354, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 21 de outubro de 1361, em Newton St Loe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.Newton St Loe, Somerset, England: нютон ст ло, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Paveley родилась около 1340 г. в местности вестбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Paveley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de la Mare, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de St Lo около 1354 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла после 21 октябрь 1361 г. в местности нютон ст ло, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия.
